rag_rules: Place assume/guarantee/eq/const in component type annexes for interface behavior; use implementation annexes for assign clauses tied to subcomponents or internal bindings.
Use only features visible at the current scope (type or implementation) in AGREE contracts; avoid subcomponent paths in type-level annexes.
generic_rules: Contract clauses should reflect interface-level invariants, not internal implementation logic.
Constants and equations should define reusable interface-bound expressions, not implementation details.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE blocks must be wrapped in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const` in type scopes; `assign` only in implementation scopes.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports or internal signals in component type annexes.
Do not mix implementation-level assignments in component type contracts.
